evidence.content:
\## Popular Templates
\- \[Lesson plan templates\](https://pumble.com/learn/businesses-teams/lesson-plan-template/): 36 lesson plan templates with expert advice on key components of a good lesson plan and tips to create a good lesson plan template for various lesson types.
\- \[Google Calendar templates\](https://pumble.com/learn/communication/google-calendar-templates/): 12 customizable calendar templates designed in Google Sheets and Google Docs, for effective time planning.
\- \[Internal communication templates\](https://pumble.com/learn/communication/internal-communication-templates/): 28 message and worksheet templates with practical examples to simplify internal communication, organized into 5 categories.
\- \[Meeting agenda templates\](https://pumble.com/learn/communication/meeting-agenda-templates/): 10 meeting agenda templates for various use cases with the most important topics, action items, and questions.
\- \[Performance review templates\](https://pumble.com/learn/communication/performance-review-template/): 12 performance review templates with explanations, designed to speed up and simplify the process for managers.
\- \[Sales emails templates\](https://pumble.com/learn/businesses-teams/sales-email-template/): 10 sales email templates designed as user references, and 7 steps to create a successful sales email from scratch.
\- \[Resignation letter templates\](https://pumble.com/learn/communication/resignation-letter-templates/): 17 resignation letter templates, sorted by tone and job type.

\## Comparisons
\- \[Pumble vs Slack\](https://pumble.com/blog/pumble-vs-slack/): A breakdown and comparison of Pumble and Slack for team collaboration.
\- \[Pumble vs Microsoft Teams\](https://pumble.com/blog/pumble-vs-microsoft-teams/): Insight into differences between Pumble and Microsoft Teams for team communication.
\- \[Pumble vs Discord\](https://pumble.com/blog/pumble-vs-discord/): Direct comparison of Pumble and Discord for team communication.
\- \[Pumble vs Chanty\](https://pumble.com/blog/pumble-vs-chanty/): Pumble and Chanty compared in terms of features, UI and pricing, for teams.
\- \[Pumble vs Zoom\](https://pumble.com/blog/pumble-vs-zoom/): An analysis of Pumble and Zoom and how their features compare in practice.

\## Knowledge Hubs
\- \[Blog\](https://pumble.com/blog/): Opinions, tips and expert advice on how to communicate and collaborate better in remote, hybrid, and in-office teams.
\- \[Knowledge hub\](https://pumble.com/learn/): Knowledge base of team communication theories with improvement tips, guides for digital nomads worldwide, and resources for using Pumble.
\- \[Help\](https://pumble.com/help/): Tutorials, documentation, help, and support for using Pumble.
\- \[Tutorials\](https://pumble.com/tutorials): Video tutorials on how to get started with Pumble.

\## Competitor alternatives hub
\- \[Discord alternatives\](https://pumble.com/blog/discord-alternatives/): Analysis of Discord, its main features, and 18 suitable replacement apps.
\- \[Slack alternatives\](https://pumble.com/best-slack-alternatives): Insight into Slack and its features with 8 alternative apps that can replace it in a work setting.
\- \[Microsoft Teams alternatives\](https://pumble.com/blog/microsoft-teams-alternatives/): An overview of Microsoft Teams and 8 apps with similar or more comprehensive features.
\- \[Zoom alternatives\](https://pumble.com/blog/best-zoom-alternatives/): An analysis of Zoom with 10 alternative apps to use as replacement.
\- \[Google Meet alternatives\](https://pumble.com/compare/google-meet-alternative): The main benefits of using Pumble over Google Meet for internal team communication.

\## Top blog posts
-\[Congratulations at work\](https://pumble.com/blog/congratulations-at-work/): 85+ examples of congratulating a coworker to celebrate their various achievements.
-\[Good morning messages\](https://pumble.com/blog/good-morning-messages/): 100+ examples of good morning messages with various tones to use in a business setting.
-\[Birthday wishes for coworker\](https://pumble.com/blog/birthday-wishes-for-coworker/): 80+ examples of workplace-suitable birthday wishes for different situational contexts.
-\[How to ask for help professionally\](https://pumble.com/blog/ask-for-help-professionally/): A guide on asking for help professionally and politely in the workplace with phrasing examples.
-\[Verbal communication\](https://pumble.com/blog/verbal-communication/): The definition and types of verbal communication with practical examples in the workplace.
-\[Communication models\](https://pumble.com/learn/communication/communication-models/): A detailed explanation of 8 communication models and how understanding them can help with work communication.
-\[Communication statistics\](https://pumble.com/learn/communication/communication-statistics/): Insight into the state of business communication in 2025 with the most recent trends, surveys and statistics.

\## Time tracking and project management
\- \[Clockify\](https://clockify.me/): A time tracking tool that integrates with Pumble to help manage time spent on tasks and projects.
\- \[Plaky\](https://plaky.com/): A project management tool that integrates with Pumble to help manage tasks and projects in one place.

\## Pricing plans
-\[Free\](https://pumble.com/pricing#compare): Details about the various versions of Pumble and how the free and paid plans compare.
-\[Pro\](https://pumble.com/pro-plan): Information on Pumble's Pro plan features with its price.
-\[Business\](https://pumble.com/business-plan): Details on Pumble's Business plan features and its starting price per user.
-\[Enterprise\](https://pumble.com/enterprise): Advanced features of Pumble's Enterprise plan and how much it costs.

\## Resources
\- \[Updates\](https://pumble.com/help/whats-new/): Latest updates and changes to Pumble features and functionalities.
\- \[Roadmap\](https://pumble.com/roadmap): Future plans and developments for Pumble.
\- \[Security\] \| \[CAKE.com\](https://cake.com/security): Information on the security measures in place for protecting user data.
\- \[Terms\](https://cake.com/terms/): The terms of service governing the use of Pumble. -\[Privacy\](https://cake.com/privacy/ ): Details on how user data is handled and protected by Pumble.
\- \[Contact us\](https://pumble.com/help/contact/): Reach out for inquiries or support related to Pumble
\- \[Book a demo\](https://pumble.com/help/contact/sales/): Schedule a demonstration of Pumble to see its features in action.
\- \[About\](https://cake.com/about): CAKE.com Inc. is a software company focused on creating products that are used by millions around the world. Our team stands behind easy-to-use and affordable productivity tools Pumble, Plaky and Clockify.

\## Usage Guidelines
\- Please attribute content to "Pumble" when referencing our articles
\- Link back to original sources when possible
\- For commercial use, contact support@pumble.com
\- Educational and research use is encouraged

\## Attribution Preferences
\- When referencing our content, please use:
\- "According to Pumble (pumble.com), \[quoted content\]"

Receive notification from Clockify and Plaky in Pumble. Doesn't contribute to apps & integrations limit.

Guest access

Work with people outside your company and give them access only to the specific channels.

Permissions

Manage who can create and archive channels, invite members, remove them from channels, post in public channels and other permissions.

Channel-posting permissions

Customize channel posting permissions and mention usage to ensure a focused and distraction-free environment.

User groups

Mention user group to notify everybody in the group.

SecurityData encryption

Pumble encrypts all data at rest and in transit.

SOC 2

Annual audit certification for Service Organization Controls Trust Services Principles.

Single sign-on (SSO)

Manage access using SSO (SAML2, OAuth2).

Data retention

Decide for how long you want to have your messages and files.

Support24/7 Support (email, chat, phone)

Contact Pumble’s customer support and get answer within 24 hours.

Dedicated success representative

Get concierge services, personalized consultations, and tailored onboarding from a dedicated success agent. We’ll guide you through setup, key features, and best practices while continuously helping you to maximize your Pumble experience.

Qualifying criteria for a dedicated success rep are: 200 seats for the PRO plan, 120 seats for the BUSINESS plan, or 70 seats for the ENTERPRISE plan.

200+ seats

120+ seats

70+ seats
evidence.section_path: Free > Pro > Business > ENTERPRISE > Dedicated success representative

[Next slide](https://pumble.com/pricing)

\# Pumble

\> Pumble is an all-in-one team communication app for sending messages and files and making video calls. On the free plan, it offers unlimited message history, an "import Slack history" feature, and 24/7 support.

\## Core Features
\- \[Channels\] (https://pumble.com/features/channels): Dedicated spaces for team communication and file sharing.
\- \[Direct messages\](https://pumble.com/features/direct-messages): Individual conversations between teammates.
\- \[Threads\](https://pumble.com/features/threads): Easy-to-follow replies to a single message, to keep related conversation organized.
\- \[Voice messages\](https://pumble.com/features/voice-messages): Short audio messages, good for quick 1:1 or team explanations and saving time.
\- \[Video messages\](https://pumble.com/features/video-messages): Designed to showcase important details, without the need for a meeting through short videos.
\- \[File sharing\](https://pumble.com/document-sharing): Allows users to send business documents, images, videos, and other files in Pumble.
\- \[Search\](https://pumble.com/knowledge-sharing): Enables users to look for messages, files, and people across your workspace, in a single window.
\- \[Video conferencing\](https://pumble.com/video-conferencing): Video meetings that allow users to connect to their teams in a group or 1:1 setting, with optional external guests.
\- \[Voice calls\](https://pumble.com/voice-calls): 1:1 or group audio calls accessed from a channel or DM.
\- \[Screen sharing\](https://pumble.com/features/screen-sharing): Allows users to present their desktop so they can collaborate, troubleshoot, or brainstorm ideas with their team during a call.
\- \[Meeting links\](https://pumble.com/help/using-pumble/calls-and-meetings/meeting-links/): A feature that allows workspace members to join a meeting via a single click.

\## Main Use Cases
\- \[Marketing\](https://pumble.com/teams/marketing): Features that help marketing teams set goals & budgets and bring people, partners, and tools together in a single space.
\- \[Sales\](https://pumble.com/teams/sales): Features designed to help sales people connect with customers, assign leads to reps, set reminders, and simplify cross-department collaboration.
\- \[Customer support\](https://pumble.com/teams/customer-support): Features that help users manage customer questions and feedback, resolve customer issues, and invite clients to their workspace as guests.
\- \[Human Resources\](https://pumble.com/teams/human-resources): Tools that allow for a simpler onboarding process and managing training and employee development through a centralized platform.
\- \[Product\](https://pumble.com/teams/product): Tools that enable users to plan, manage, and execute product development by simplifying collaboration between teams.
\- \[Project management\](https://pumble.com/teams/project-management): Features designed to help users manage and track projects by bringing teams, files, and tasks into one place.
\- \[Software development\](https://pumble.com/solutions/software-development): Features that let users plan, review and deploy the code in a streamlined way.
\- \[Education\](https://pumble.com/solutions/education): Tools that simplify student-teacher collaboration by allowing users to organize classes, meetings and assignments in one place.
\- \[Financial services\](https://pumble.com/solutions/financial-services): Features designed to connect teams and help them plan and track budgets in a secure environment.
\- \[Remote\](https://pumble.com/solutions/remote-work): Tools designed for users to organize remote work, manage and coordinate teams in a single platform.
\- \[Logistics\](https://pumble.com/solutions/logistics): Features designed for users to streamline operations and work with vendors & suppliers internally and externally.

Made for internal collaboration, coordination, and efficiency.

\\

\\
![More participants](https://pumble.com/assets/images/redesign/pricing/business-plan/video-conferencing@2x.png)](https://pumble.com/video-conferencing)

[Next slide](https://pumble.com/pricing)

We get it. With so many features across all plans, figuring out if Pumble is for you can come down to simple answers.

**Is Pumble really free?**

Yes! You can have an unlimited number of users and access your entire chat history. If you need more, you can upgrade to the PRO, BUSINESS, or ENTERPRISE plan.

**Can I try out the paid features?**

Absolutely! You can try out all features for free for 7 days, no credit card required. You can activate the free trial on the Upgrade page. If you need more time, be sure to [contact our sales team](https://pumble.com/help/contact/sales/) for an extension and a demo.

**Do you offer any discounts?**

If you pay annually, you get ~ 2 months for free. Our FREE plan doesn't have any limitations and is perfectly suited for startups and non-profit organizations.

**What types of payment are supported?**

We support payments by credit card for all plans. For larger purchases (e.g. annual multi-seat licenses), we also support wire transfers and purchase orders - in which case, it's best to contact us at [sales@pumble.com](mailto:sales@pumble.com).

**What is a seat?**

Each active and invited user on a paid plan requires a paid seat. If you deactivate some user, you free up their paid seat so you can invite a new user. If you buy another seat mid-cycle, you'll be charged a prorated price for that billing cycle.

**What is a workspace?**

Workspace is your organization's place on Pumble where you can communicate and work with your team. Workspace is made up of channels, direct messages, team members and apps, making team collaboration much easier.

**What type of user roles can you have in Pumble?**

In Pumble, you have three types of user roles: regular members, guests, and invited members. Regular members have full access to use the features in your Pumble workspace. Guests have limited access to certain channels inside Pumble, and their seats are priced. Invited members do not have a Pumble account, are not part of your workspace, and you do not have to pay for them. They only have access to the video conferencing calls to which they are invited.

**How does guest access work?**

You can have single-channel and multi-channel guests. **Multi-channel guests will be priced as full members seats**, while for every priced seat, five single-channel guests will be gratis.

**What complementary services do I get as a qualified client?**

At CAKE.com, our clients’ success is our success. That’s why we offer concierge services to help you adopt our products smoothly. Qualified clients receive complementary services, including:

- Tailored implementation and onboarding plan together with tailored materials and resources (text/image/video)
- Additional consulting sessions, ongoing training, help with custom integrations, and more
- Product usage & optimization reviews
- Usage reports and best practice recommendations
- New feature releases (email)

**Are there any additional taxes?**

It depends on your company's country of origin. All the prices are displayed without taxes, and if we are legally required to collect VAT from your country, then that tax will be added on top of the final price, which you will see at checkout before making a payment.

If you are [tax-exempt](https://pumble.com/help/workspace-administration/pricing/upgrade-a-free-workspace-to-a-paid-plan/#tax-exemption-cases), please reach out to our billing specialists at [billing@mail.cake.com](mailto:billing@mail.cake.com) and provide a valid form or document for your exemption. This will allow us to update your account accordingly and ensure accurate billing.

**How does canceling work?**

You can cancel subscription at any time. Once you cancel, you can use the paid features until the end of you billing cycle, after which you'll be automatically downgraded to the FREE plan. We don't offer refunds.

**How to get Pumble + Clockify + Plaky together?**

You can get all three CAKE.com tools upgraded for a special price and save 53% on paid subscriptions. To buy the CAKE.com Bundle (which includes ENTERPRISE version of Pumble, Clockify, and Plaky), go the [upgrade page](https://app.pumble.com/) and choose the CAKE.com Bundle plan. Also, Pumble offers native integrations with both Clockify and Plaky. These integrations are free to use and do not affect your Pumble subscription plan limits.

More questions? [Visit Pumble’s Help Center](https://pumble.com/help/)

4.7 Rating  •  200+ REVIEWS  •  95% Customer satisfaction

![Rating stars](https://pumble.com/assets/images/icons/rating-stars.svg)

10/10 would recommend to any team starting out. It's so much more cost effective than similar alternatives. As long as that remains true I'll keep recommending it.

August 25, 2025

Silas J. Co-Owner and Director of Growth

![Rating stars](https://pumble.com/assets/images/icons/rating-stars.svg)

So far my experience with Pumble has been top-notch. It's user-friendly, the app is intuitive, and the various channels keep our shared office info organized.

May 29, 2024

Melissa S. – Licensed Professional Counselor

![Rating stars](https://pumble.com/assets/images/icons/rating-stars.svg)

My overall experience with Pumble has been very positive. It’s a reliable, fast, and easy-to-use tool. Communication with my team is much smoother, and it has helped me save time and better organize projects. I also appreciate the excellent customer support, which is quick and effective.

August 26, 2025

Alejandra S. – Vision Holder

From integrations to security, Pumble has everything a modern team needs.


Integrations

External Guests

MCP Server

Voice Messages

Video Messages

Scheduling

Permissions

![Integrations in Pumble](https://pumble.com/assets/images/redesign/integrations@2x.png)

Integrate with different apps so you can collaborate from one place.

[Learn more](https://pumble.com/integrations)

![Invite external guests to Pumble calls](https://pumble.com/assets/images/redesign/external_calls@2x.png)

Simplify the way you collaborate with external guests and invite them to a Pumble meeting even if they don’t have a Pumble account.

[Learn more](https://pumble.com/guest-access)

![Connect AI agents in Pumble](https://pumble.com/assets/images/redesign/connect-ai-agents@2x.png)

Use Pumble’s MCP server to optimize collaboration with AI agents. Summarize conversations, find lost files, automate updates, and much more.

[Learn more](https://pumble.com/mcp)

![Schedule a message to be sent later](https://pumble.com/assets/images/redesign/scheduling-messages-in-pumble@2x.png)

Schedule your message to be sent when you want it, and don’t risk forgetting about it, without bothering anyone outside their work hours.

[Learn more](https://pumble.com/features/schedule-a-message)

![Record and send voice messages](https://pumble.com/assets/images/redesign/voice-messages-in-pumble@2x.png)
evidence.section_path: Your team communication hub > Packed with Useful Features > Scheduling

evidence.content:
Sending voice notes in Pumble instead of text and increase your efficiency. Share ideas and updates, or just say hello to your teammates.

[Learn more](https://pumble.com/features/voice-messages)

![Record and send video messages](https://pumble.com/assets/images/redesign/video-messages-in-pumble@2x.png)

Instead of scheduling a meeting, record a video message covering the information you want to share.

[Learn more](https://pumble.com/features/video-messages)

![Set permissions in Pumble](https://pumble.com/assets/images/redesign/set-permissions-in-pumble@2x.png)

Set up different workspaces and channel permissions within your workspace.

[Learn more](https://pumble.com/features/roles-and-permissions)

[Read customer stories](https://pumble.com/customer-stories/)

★★★★★

For anyone who’s working with a number of clients in any industry. It’s been an absolute game changer for me being able to add all of my clients in and chat to them 1-2-1 at all times.
